method: No-price public-source overlay built from existing live scanner row evidence. It summarizes growth pressure and inflation/policy pressure; it does not replace asset scores and does not produce buy/sell signals.
subtitle: Growth mixed / inflation mixed
simpleRead: The scanner does not have enough directional evidence to classify a clean macro quadrant. Source pressure is mixed, near neutral, or low conviction.
mainConflict: Both growth and inflation axes are near neutral, source coverage is limited, or live evidence is mixed.

states.name: Goldilocks
states.subtitle: Growth supportive / inflation easing
states.simpleRead: Growth pressure is supportive while inflation pressure is calm or easing. This is usually the cleanest broad risk-supportive backdrop.

states.name: Goldilocks / Reflation Blend
states.subtitle: Growth supportive / inflation mixed
states.simpleRead: Growth still looks supportive, but inflation pressure is unclear or shifting. The backdrop sits between clean Goldilocks and hotter Reflation.

states.name: Reflation
states.subtitle: Growth supportive / inflation hot
states.simpleRead: Growth remains supportive, but inflation and policy pressure are elevated. Risk can still work, but rate and dollar pressure matter.

states.name: Reflation / Stagflation Blend
states.subtitle: Growth mixed / inflation hot
states.simpleRead: Inflation and policy pressure are elevated, but growth evidence is mixed. The backdrop sits between hot-growth Reflation and stagflation risk.

states.name: Stagflation
states.subtitle: Growth weak / inflation hot
states.simpleRead: Growth pressure is weakening while inflation pressure remains elevated. This is a difficult backdrop where conflict matters.

states.name: Stagflation / Deflation Blend
states.subtitle: Growth weak / inflation mixed
states.simpleRead: Growth is weak, but inflation pressure is unclear or shifting. The backdrop sits between sticky-inflation slowdown and deflationary slowdown.

states.name: Deflation
states.subtitle: Growth weak / inflation easing
states.simpleRead: Growth is weakening and inflation pressure is easing. This is usually a defensive slowdown-style backdrop.

states.name: Deflation / Goldilocks Blend
states.subtitle: Growth mixed / inflation easing
states.simpleRead: Inflation pressure is cooling, but growth evidence is mixed. The backdrop sits between defensive Deflation and cleaner Goldilocks recovery.

states.name: Neutral / Low-Conviction Macro Pressure
states.subtitle: Growth mixed / inflation mixed
states.simpleRead: The scanner does not have enough directional evidence to classify a clean macro quadrant. Source pressure is mixed, near neutral, or low conviction.

limits: Uses current public-source pressure only; no price data is used.
